node_kinds.name: IPA_Environment
node_kinds.description: A FreeIPA realm or domain collected by OpenIPAHound.

node_kinds.name: IPA_User
node_kinds.description: A FreeIPA user account collected from cn=users.

node_kinds.name: IPA_Group
node_kinds.description: A FreeIPA user group collected from cn=groups.

node_kinds.name: IPA_Role
node_kinds.description: A FreeIPA role collected from cn=roles.

node_kinds.name: IPA_Privilege
node_kinds.description: A FreeIPA privilege collected from cn=privileges.

node_kinds.name: IPA_Permission
node_kinds.description: A FreeIPA permission collected from cn=permissions.

node_kinds.name: IPA_CA
node_kinds.description: A FreeIPA certificate authority collected from cn=cas.

node_kinds.name: IPA_CertificateTemplate
node_kinds.description: A FreeIPA certificate profile that can be granted by CA ACLs.

node_kinds.name: IPA_SELinux
node_kinds.description: A FreeIPA SELinux user map collected from cn=usermap,cn=selinux.

node_kinds.name: IPA_TrustedDomain
node_kinds.description: A trusted Active Directory domain known to FreeIPA.

node_kinds.name: IPA_Computer
node_kinds.description: A FreeIPA enrolled host collected from cn=computers.

node_kinds.name: IPA_Service
node_kinds.description: A FreeIPA service principal collected from cn=services.

node_kinds.name: IPA_HostGroup
node_kinds.description: A FreeIPA hostgroup collected from cn=hostgroups.

relationship_kinds.name: IPA_MemberOf
relationship_kinds.description: Object is a direct member of a FreeIPA group or hostgroup.

relationship_kinds.name: IPA_HasRole
relationship_kinds.description: Principal has a FreeIPA role assignment derived from role membership/memberOf data.

relationship_kinds.name: IPA_HasPrivilege
relationship_kinds.description: FreeIPA role has a privilege derived from privilege membership/memberOf data.

relationship_kinds.name: IPA_ContainsPermission
relationship_kinds.description: FreeIPA privilege contains a permission derived from permission membership/memberOf data.

relationship_kinds.name: IPA_AddMember
relationship_kinds.description: Principal can add members to a FreeIPA group through memberManager permission.

relationship_kinds.name: IPA_Owns
relationship_kinds.description: Object controls another FreeIPA object through a managedBy attribute.

relationship_kinds.name: IPA_AllowedToDelegate
relationship_kinds.description: Service principal can delegate to another service through FreeIPA general constrained delegation or target-side resource delegation.

relationship_kinds.name: IPA_AddRBCD
relationship_kinds.description: Principal can edit a FreeIPA service's target-side resource delegation ACL through write_delegation permission.

relationship_kinds.name: IPA_ForceChangePassword
relationship_kinds.description: Principal can replace a FreeIPA service key through write_keys permission.

relationship_kinds.name: IPA_ReadKerberosKey
relationship_kinds.description: Principal can read a FreeIPA service key through read_keys permission.

relationship_kinds.name: IPA_Enroll
relationship_kinds.description: Principal can enroll a FreeIPA certificate template through an enabled CA ACL.

relationship_kinds.name: IPA_TrustedBy
relationship_kinds.description: Trusted external domain can authenticate to the FreeIPA environment through an AD trust.

relationship_kinds.name: IPA_DCSync
relationship_kinds.description: Replication administrator permission implies DC-equivalent synchronization capability in the FreeIPA environment.

relationship_kinds.name: IPA_CanSSH
relationship_kinds.description: Principal can establish an SSH session to a FreeIPA host through an enabled HBAC rule.

relationship_kinds.name: IPA_CanHBACService
relationship_kinds.description: Principal has FreeIPA HBAC service authorization aggregated for a principal-host pair; non-traversable because service meaning is protocol-specific.

relationship_kinds.name: IPA_CanSUDO
relationship_kinds.description: Principal can use sudo on a FreeIPA host through a matching sudo rule and HBAC sudo grant.
